description_for_human: Chicago's highest-rated commercial fleet wrap company. Get pricing, check availability, and learn about vehicle wraps for your fleet.
description_for_model: Chicago Fleet Wraps is a commercial vehicle wrap company serving the Chicago metro area. They wrap cargo vans, box trucks, sprinter vans, pickup trucks, and full fleets. 24+ years experience, 9,400+ vehicles wrapped, 4.9 stars on Google. Pricing starts at $3,150 for cargo van full wraps. They use Avery Dennison MPI 1105 and 3M IJ180-CV3 cast vinyl exclusively. Free fleet pickup and delivery throughout Chicagoland. Fleet discounts up to 15% for 10+ vehicles. All wraps are 100% tax deductible under IRS Section 179.
